project_type: Full-stack app: Next.js 15 App Router frontend + FastAPI backend with Vertex AI Gemini agents
build_system: npm for frontend, pip for backend. No monorepo tool. Each directory is independent.
test_framework: Jest (frontend, passWithNoTests), no pytest setup for backend
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend && npm run build && npm run lint
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npm run build` in frontend/ - must pass. 2. Run `npm run lint` in frontend/ - must pass. 3. Run `python -m py_compile app/main.py` in backend/ - must pass. 4. Run `python -m py_compile app/agents/orchestrator.py` in backend/.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No Docker needed. Backend validation is syntax-only (no running server). DO NOT modify: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, Providers.tsx, entity/, mcp-servers/, shared/
contribution_requirements: Stay on branch feat/premium-ui-rebuild. Clear commit messages. Frontend must pass build. Backend Python files must be syntactically valid.
key_patterns: CSS variables for theming (--bg, --surface, --border, --text-primary, etc). Matte design system (no glass/gradient in new components). Tailwind with custom colors (accent-500, success-500, warning-500, danger-500). Framer Motion for animations. Components use 'use client' directive. Backend agents extend AgentBase, register via AgentRegistry. MCP client calls tools on google-tasks/google-calendar/google-gmail servers. Frontend uses lib/api.ts for REST calls (cannot modify) - new endpoints need new file lib/api-extended.ts.
directory_structure: frontend/ - Next.js 15 app with app/ (pages), components/ (UI, chat, layout, entity, voice, spotify), hooks/, lib/. backend/ - FastAPI with app/ (main.py, agents/, api/, db/, mcp/, scheduler/, utils/). mcp-servers/ - DO NOT MODIFY. shared/ - WebSocket schemas.
